subject: Sports
title: Basketball at the Olympics
description: A short lesson to help you apply Basketball at the Olympics.

hook.text: The United States has won 16 of 20 Olympic men's basketball gold medals. But rivals are closing in.

buildup.text: Basketball became an Olympic sport in 1936. The US dominated for decades with amateur, then professional players.

discovery.text: After the 2004 'Bronze Medal Nightmare' in Athens, the US took Olympic basketball seriously again.

twist.text: Argentina beat the US in 2004. Spain pushed them in 2008 and 2012. France challenged in 2020 and 2024.

climax.text: As the NBA globalizes, Olympic basketball becomes more competitive—and more compelling to watch.

punchline.text: The world is catching up. Olympic basketball has never been better.

quiz.question: How many Olympic men's basketball golds has the US won?
